summary: Critical blocker (Azure OpenAI PTU) correctly handled; two must-fix gaps (unresolved tag policy, 20 unanalyzed MCAPSGov audit policies) and five should-fix issues addressed before approval gate

must_fix.finding: Tag policy completely unresolved — the Required Tags table listed '[unresolved]' for all tag names with no concrete tag key captured.
must_fix.recommendation: Add AGENTS.md 4-tag baseline as mandatory fallback until live resolution is run.
must_fix.resolution: FIXED — AGENTS.md 4-tag baseline (Environment, ManagedBy, Project, Owner) added to Required Tags table as mandatory fallback with IaC action column.

must_fix.finding: 20 MCAPSGov Audit Policies entirely absent from markdown analysis. auditIfNotExists policies may impose architecture constraints for Container Apps, Cosmos DB, Event Hubs, APIM, Key Vault.
must_fix.location: ## 📜 Compliance Frameworks — no audit policy enumeration
must_fix.recommendation: Add MCAPSGov Audit Policies initiative row with advisory note. Run --refresh to enumerate all 20 definitions.
must_fix.resolution: FIXED — MCAPSGov Audit Policies row added to Compliance Frameworks table with advisory note. Full enumeration deferred to --refresh run before production.

should_fix.finding: Blocker count inconsistency: markdown shows 7 (deduplicated) vs JSON blocker_count: 9 (includes 3 duplicate 'Block VM SKU Sizes' entries from multi-scope inheritance).
should_fix.recommendation: Align JSON blocker_count to 7 unique, or add raw vs unique count fields.
should_fix.resolution: DEFERRED — JSON is discover.py output (authoritative ETL); markdown explains deduplication. Noted as known inconsistency for Step 4 IaC Planner.

should_fix.finding: MFA enforcement policies have no CI/CD impact analysis — risk of IaC deploy agents misclassifying automated deployments as policy-blocked.
should_fix.recommendation: Document that MFA targets human sign-ins only; service principals exempt.
should_fix.resolution: FIXED — MFA CI/CD clarification note added to Compliance Frameworks section.

should_fix.finding: Log Analytics cost impact claim was factually incorrect: 'PerGB2018 at 100 GB/day is equivalent to 100 GB/day commitment tier; no cost change expected.' Actual PerGB2018 at 100 GB/day is ~€6,900/month vs ~€2,230 for commitment tier.
should_fix.location: ## 🚫 Deployment Blockers > Block Azure Sentinel Commitment over 100 > Cost impact
should_fix.recommendation: Correct cost statement with accurate MVP vs production scale breakdown.
should_fix.resolution: FIXED — Cost statement corrected: PerGB2018 is cheaper at MVP scale, commitment tier cheaper at production scale.

should_fix.finding: Key Vault Managed HSM shows ❌ status in Security Policies table despite being not applicable. ❌ universally implies non-compliance.
should_fix.recommendation: Change ❌ to ✅ N/A — Key Vault Premium used, not Managed HSM.
should_fix.resolution: FIXED — Status changed to ✅ N/A with explanatory text.

should_fix.finding: No healthcare regulatory compliance gap analysis for GDPR/NEN 7510/ISO 27001. NEN 7510 is legally required for Dutch healthcare organizations.
should_fix.recommendation: Add Healthcare Regulatory Compliance Map with GDPR Art. 44 (data residency), NEN 7510 A.9 (PHI access logging), GDPR Art. 32 (pseudonymization), GDPR Art. 33 (breach notification) gap analysis.
should_fix.resolution: PARTIALLY FIXED — Healthcare Regulatory Note added flagging NEN 7510 and GDPR Article 32/44 as pre-production gate items for Step 7 As-Built agent. Full compliance map deferred to governance refresh.

should_fix.finding: Diagnostic storage account DNS conflict with private endpoint architecture left unresolved.
should_fix.recommendation: Add guidance: confirm with subscription owner whether McapsGovernance diagnostic storage has pre-existing private endpoint, or request policy exemption.
should_fix.resolution: DEFERRED — noted in artifact as 'verify no conflict with private DNS zones for Storage Account'. Full resolution requires subscription owner confirmation.

observations: Azure OpenAI PTU blocker (CF-GOV-CRITICAL) correctly handled with specific blocked SKU names and Bicep property path.
VM/AKS/VMSS/Guest Configuration inapplicability assessments correctly reasoned with Container Apps Consumption justification.
Blob public access Modify policy alignment is correct.
Key Vault Premium vs Managed HSM distinction correctly identified.
Log Analytics 100 GB/day boundary risk analysis is sound; PerGB2018 recommendation is architecturally correct.
McapsGovernance RG auto-deployment correctly documented as subscription-scope auto-creation.
resolution_summary: All must-fix items resolved. 3 of 6 should-fix items resolved. CF-GOV-003 (JSON count) and CF-GOV-008 (DNS guidance) deferred as minor notes. CF-GOV-007 partially addressed with pre-production gate note.
